text: Listen and complete the notes in exercise 10. Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Good morning, everyone. In today's lecture I want to talk to you about a

explanation: صفتی برای توصیف چیزی که مورد علاقه عموم نیست.

text: animal here in Britain. In fact, you could say that it's one of our least loved animals! It's called the American bullfrog and yes, it does in fact come from America - the east of America, to be exact - and it was

explanation: گذشته نقلی مجهول از فعل bring؛ به معنای انتقال دادن چیزی به مکانی جدید.

text: Britain in the early 19th century, so you could say that it's been here for quite a long time. It wasn't brought here

explanation: انجام کاری با نیت قبلی و هدفمند.

text: - it actually arrived in a big container of

explanation: گیاهانی که در آب زندگی می‌کنند.
وارد کردن یک گونه غیربومی به یک محیط جدید بدون قصد قبلی.

text:
into Britain.
Now, I'll tell you a little about its appearance. The American bullfrog is a very large - and ugly -

explanation: گروهی از موجودات زنده که دارای ویژگی‌های مشابه هستند.

text: of frog. And when I say it's large, I mean large. Interestingly, female American bullfrogs are usually much larger than the males. In fact, they can weigh up to 750 grams, whereas the males only go up to about 600 grams. Take a look at its head - it's really

explanation: معادل کلمه wide؛ برای توصیف سطوح گسترده به کار می‌رود.

text:
and flat, isn't it? And you can see its mouth -just here - that's quite large too.
Now, both the male and the female American bullfrogs have green or brown bodies and have dark spots on the top. But there's one important difference between them - the male's

explanation: قسمت جلوی گردن که در شناسایی برخی گونه‌ها مهم است.

text: is yellow but the female has a white one instead. And the other difference is their

explanation: غشایی در گوش که لرزش‌های صوتی را دریافت می‌کند.

text:
, here just behind their eyes. Those of the male are much larger than the female's.
So, let's move on to why we so

explanation: احساس منفی نسبت به چیزی یا کسی.

text: the American bullfrog. Well, this is because it has

explanation: به خطر انداختن بقا یا ایمنی چیزی.
حیوانات یا گیاهانی که به طور طبیعی متعلق به یک منطقه هستند.

text: very quickly indeed. For example, female bullfrogs can lay up to 25,000 eggs every single season. And secondly, the American bullfrog is very

explanation: تمایل به خوردن یا داشتن بیش از حد نیاز.

text: . In fact, they eat just about anything they can put into their mouths! As well as other frogs, they eat insects, fish and have even been known to eat birds and snakes! So, in other words, they eat the

explanation: ذخایر و انواع غذاهایی که یک موجود زنده برای بقا نیاز دارد.

text: of our own native species. Thirdly, they carry a

explanation: یک اختلال در ساختار یا عملکرد بدن موجود زنده.

text: that is dangerous to other frogs. And finally, they don't just damage our natural world, they cause

explanation: ضرر و زیان‌های مربوط به پول و اقتصاد.
مشاهده و بررسی مداوم یک وضعیت در طول زمان.

text:
the American bullfrog in the wild.
So, as scientists, we can learn a lesson from this about the dangers of introducing any living species into a new

explanation: شرایطی که یک حیوان یا گیاه در آن زندگی می‌کند.

text:
Check your answers carefully.
• Did you spell your words correctly?
• Did you write numbers as digits?
• Did you write a singular noun or plural noun for question 5?
